mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS id, p.title AS title, p.is_completed AS isCompleted, p.completed_time AS completedTime, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT n.id), 0) AS nodeCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0) AS taskCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ts.is_terminal = 1 THEN t.id END), 0) AS completedCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0) AS totalCount, p.update_time AS updateTime FROM mobe_project p LEFT JOIN mobe_node n ON n.user_id = p.user_id AND n.owner_type = 'PROJECT' AND n.owner_id = p.id AND n.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_item t ON t.user_id = p.user_id AND ( (t.direct_owner_type = 'PROJECT' AND t.direct_owner_id = p.id) OR (t.direct_owner_type = 'NODE' AND t.direct_owner_id = n.id) ) AND t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_status ts ON ts.id = t.current_status_id AND ts.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_deleted = 0
AND p.is_completed = 0
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.is_completed, p.completed_time, p.update_time ORDER BY p.is_completed ASC, p.update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM mobe_project p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_deleted = 0
AND p.is_completed = 0
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT p.id AS id, p.title AS title, p.content AS content, p.remark AS remark, p.execution_mode AS executionMode, p.status_template_id AS statusTemplateId, p.is_completed AS isCompleted, p.completed_time AS completedTime, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT n.id), 0) AS nodeCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0) AS taskCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ts.is_terminal = 1 THEN t.id END), 0) AS completedCount, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT t.id), 0) AS totalCount, p.update_time AS updateTime FROM mobe_project p LEFT JOIN mobe_node n ON n.user_id = p.user_id AND n.owner_type = 'PROJECT' AND n.owner_id = p.id AND n.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_item t ON t.user_id = p.user_id AND ( (t.direct_owner_type = 'PROJECT' AND t.direct_owner_id = p.id) OR (t.direct_owner_type = 'NODE' AND t.direct_owner_id = n.id) ) AND t.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN mobe_task_status ts ON ts.id = t.current_status_id AND ts.is_deleted = 0 WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.content, p.remark, p.execution_mode, p.status_template_id, p.is_completed, p.completed_time, p.update_time
